mano_cua.result_summary: Laverna页面完全空白，SPA的JavaScript未初始化（html标签class=no-js未被移除）。bower依赖dropbox repo已失效，Modernizr等关键JS可能加载失败，导致整个应用链无法启动。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page stays blank despite multiple refresh attempts. HTML class='no-js' indicates JavaScript initialization failed (Modernizr should remove this). bower_components may be incomplete (dropbox repo dead). SPA cannot render without JS.
